page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture utilizing an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 16 dedicated physical cores and 16 vCPUs, offering a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The processor includes 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 33 MB of L3 cache, with support for AVX, AVX512F, AES, and FMA instruction sets. No local storage or GPU hardware is bundled with this instance type.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance profile for the ecs.n2.3xlarge. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng single-core CPU and single-threaded compression tests placing in the bottom 25% and 10% respectively. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, with stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU scores falling into the middle 50% tier. Memory bandwidth remains average, measuring 78.8 GB/sec for large block read-only operations and 47.29 GB/sec for large block write operations, though PassMark memory scores are categorized as weak.

With its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.n2.3xlarge is suited for workloads that benefit from parallel processing rather than high single-thread performance. Appropriate use cases include multi-threaded database operations, static web serving, and redis caching, where it achieves an average of 20.14 million operations per second. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation provides predictable performance for mid-tier enterprise applications, though the lack of local storage requires external block storage integration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance featuring 16 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor on the x86_64 architecture. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio with no bundled local storage or GPU resources. Performance benchmarks show weak single-core CPU and single-threaded compression capabilities, but multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently reach average tiers. The instance supports advanced instruction sets like AVX512F and AES. It is best suited for multi-threaded workloads, static web serving, and medium-scale database operations that require dedicated CPU resources but do not demand high single-thread execution speeds.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and no local storage, offering balanced multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.n2.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and KVM-based virtualization.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core virtual server with a balanced resource profile for parallel processing and standard enterprise workloads.

Intel x86_64 architecture with AVX512F and AES support
Average multi-core performance and memory bandwidth
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Well-suited for static web serving and multi-threaded database operations
